_comment: Model routing policy: the brain does judgment, the hands do high-volume execution. This file documents intent; the wiring happens via Claude Code Router (docs/setup-routing.md). Benchmark context in docs/model-tiers.md.

hands.note: Hands read and draft; the brain edits. See docs/setup-routing.md for why.

privacy_line.rule: Personal/identity data, private files, secrets, and any user PII NEVER go to a HOSTED cheap third-party API (z.ai/DeepSeek are China-hosted).
privacy_line.escape_hatch: GLM weights are open: self-host on your own box for anything near sensitive data, so nothing leaves your infra. The hosted cheap APIs see only non-sensitive code and public text.
privacy_line.enforcement: Route PII-touching tasks to the brain (Anthropic) or a self-hosted model; keep the cheap hosted providers on background/no-PII work only.
